rows.text: Today we honored the names etched into the Vietnam Veterans Memorial through the humble act of washing the wall. It’s our way of saying welcome home and remembering their sacrifice. It’s also a reminder to those in the future, that if you don’t step up as well, this freedom we have, is not there.

author.description: Ending fraud against the American taxpayer.

rows.text: The era of unchecked fraud against the American taxpayer is over. I’m proud to serve as Executive Director of the @WHFraudTF led by @VP Vance and @AfergusonFTC. As a former Trump United States Attorney, I’m continuing the fight against criminals who exploit our nation. My promise to you is this: we will fight EVERY DAY to protect you and your loved ones from fraudsters who steal from YOU and threaten our most vulnerable fellow Americans. 🇺🇸

rows.text: In New Delhi, I met with Indian Prime Minister @narendramodi to underscore the importance of the U.S.-India relationship. We discussed the situation in the Middle East and U.S.-India partnership in energy, securing critical supply chains, and collaboration on emerging technologies. I was pleased to invite Prime Minister Modi to the White House on behalf of the President.

I was pleased to invite Prime Minister Modi to the White House on behalf of the President.

rows.text:
.@POTUS has already cut billions in red tape that drove up housing costs during the Biden Administration – and taken historic action to stop Wall Street from buying up single-family homes.

Now, SBA is teaming up with @SecretaryTurner and @HUDgov to unlock new capital for builders to SUPERCHARGE residential construction and expand the supply of housing in communities across America.

By empowering builders and homebuyers alike, this Administration is working to make the American Dream of homeownership more affordable than ever before.
rows.text_resolved:
.@POTUS has already cut billions in red tape that drove up housing costs during the Biden Administration – and taken historic action to stop Wall Street from buying up single-family homes.

Now, SBA is teaming up with @SecretaryTurner and @HUDgov to unlock new capital for builders to SUPERCHARGE residential construction and expand the supply of housing in communities across America.

By empowering builders and homebuyers alike, this Administration is working to make the American Dream of homeownership more affordable than ever before.

rows.text:
Congressman Castro’s playing the classic empathy trap.  

Painting ICE as “rogue abusers” for detaining a Venezuelan family at a school bus stop. Dramatic optics, for sure, but misleading as hell…

Fact: This family entered on parole in 2021, had pending asylum claims, but no permanent legal status per DHS. ICE enforced the law. 

The system working is working here, not “tyranny.”

Local Texas cops aren’t “turned into ICE agents.” They only engage on immigration when criminal conduct brings someone into custody—standard 287(g) cooperation for public safety. 

Castro wants sanctuary rules that shield criminal violators thus eroding public trust.

Meanwhile, budgets are crushed by immigrant welfare use, education, healthcare, and housing for households without full status. 

Taxpayers foot the bill while services are taken from American citizens. That’s not compassion, and it is unsustainable.

Castro’s selective story hides the real game.  Weak enforcement creates chaos, divided communities, and forces locals to clean up the mess. Americans want laws followed, not selective laws and emotional theater. 

Enforce borders. Prioritize citizens. Accountability over anecdotes.

Rule of law isn’t abuse. It’s the foundation.

Mass deportations are the solution!
rows.text_resolved:
